name: DataForSEO MCP Server
what_it_does: DataForSEO MCP server enabling AI agents to access comprehensive SEO and search data — fetching SERP results for any keyword, retrieving keyword metrics (search volume, CPC, competition), analyzing backlinks, and integrating DataForSEO's professional SEO data API into agent-driven SEO analysis and digital marketing workflows.
use_cases: Fetching real-time SERP results for any keyword from SEO analysis agents
Retrieving keyword search volume and competition data from keyword research agents
Analyzing competitor backlink profiles from link building agents
Generating SEO audit reports from website analysis agents
Tracking keyword rankings over time from rank tracking agents
Building content strategies based on search data from marketing agents
not_for: Non-SEO search data needs (use Serper or Brave Search for general web search)
Free usage at scale (DataForSEO is a paid professional API)
Real-time social media analytics (DataForSEO is search-focused)
best_when: An agent needs professional SEO data — SERP results, keyword metrics, backlink analysis, or rank tracking with reliable, commercial-grade data.
avoid_when: You just need web search results rather than SEO metrics — Serper or Brave Search APIs are cheaper for simple SERP queries.

auth.notes: DataForSEO API login (username + password/API key). HTTP Basic auth with DataForSEO credentials. Register at dataforseo.com for API access. Login and password passed as credentials.

pricing.paid_tiers: SERP: ~$0.0012-0.006/task; Keyword data varies by dataset
pricing.notes: DataForSEO is a professional paid API. Usage-based pricing per API task. Small free trial. Credit card required for ongoing use. One of the more affordable professional SEO data providers.

performance.rate_limits: DataForSEO: up to 2,000 tasks/minute depending on plan

known_agent_gotchas: DataForSEO uses a task-based API: create task, poll for results — not synchronous
API response structure is deeply nested — agents need to navigate complex JSON
Costs accrue per API task — implement safeguards to avoid runaway API calls
Community MCP (Skobyn) — not official DataForSEO MCP; may not cover all endpoints
SERP data is location and language specific — always specify target parameters
Rate limit units are 'tasks' not requests — understand task vs request distinction
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. HTTP Basic auth (username/password). GDPR compliant. Community MCP. Store credentials as environment variables. Monitor API usage costs to prevent runaway billing.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Basic auth credentials. GDPR compliant. Community MCP. Store credentials as environment variables. Monitor costs.
